title: AppLauncher.exe
html:
AppLauncher.exe

User Experience Virtualization tool that launches applications under monitoring to capture and synchronize user settings.

Execute

Executes an executable under a trusted, Microsoft signed binary.

AppLauncher.exe {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.exe}

Launches an executable via User Experience Virtualization tool. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
